title: Helium Inflated Balloon in a Box - Happy 60th Birthday Blue Holographic on a Tasselled Weight with Confetti Sprinkles and Surprise Gift
features: BALLOON IN A BOX - Your balloon will be tied to a tasselled weight in a tissue lined box with lots of curly ribbon and confetti sprinkles to make it the best gift it can be
INCLUDES SURPRISE GIFT - We include a lovely little gift card allowing your recipient to name a rose and plant it forever in one of our virtual rose gardens
PERSONAL MESSAGE - If you're sending as a gift, your personal message will be included on one of our colourful gift cards in an envelope with your recipient's name hand written on it
INTERBALLOON STORE - Check out our huge selection of balloons in a box from our store brought to you by a real family run high street balloon shop
description: Just a few product points to note. • NO HELIUM REQUIRED - We pre-inflate each balloon with helium and deliver them fully inflated for an instant, straight out the box party. • EXTRA BALLOON COLOURS - Our range includes stars, hearts and circle balloons in gold, silver, blue, light blue, green, lime green, purple, fuchsia, pink, lilac, red, yellow, rose gold, black and white. • CHECKED FOR QUALITY - We inflate each balloon and rest them for at least an hour before despatch to ensure there are no holes/leaks. • NON DELIVERY AREA - Due to the nature of helium filled balloons we are unable to deliver to Northern Ireland or the Isles as Royal Mail often fly the balloons there and the change in air pressure damages/bursts the balloons. • DON'T FORGET - To add a personal message for the recipient just select 'this item is a gift' whilst checking out.
